tasks.name: Engine Oil & Filter
tasks.notes: Replace when wrench indicator light is ON; upper limit is 16,000 km or 12 months. For severe driving conditions (extended idling, dusty/cold/hot/mountainous), replace every 8,000 km or 6 months. Reset engine oil data after every replacement.

tasks.name: Spark Plugs (SKYACTIV-G 2.5T)
tasks.notes: Applies to SKYACTIV-G 2.5T engine only. Replace every 64,000 km (40,000 miles).

tasks.name: Spark Plugs (SKYACTIV-G 2.0 / 2.5 non-T)
tasks.notes: Applies to all engines except SKYACTIV-G 2.5T. Replace every 120,000 km (75,000 miles).

tasks.name: Engine Air Filter
tasks.notes: Replace every 56,000 km (35,000 miles) or 36 months, whichever comes first.

tasks.name: Cabin Air Filter
tasks.notes: Replace every 32,000 km (20,000 miles) or 24 months, whichever comes first.

tasks.name: Drive Belts
tasks.notes: Inspect and replace if necessary. Also inspect air conditioner drive belts if equipped. Inspect more frequently under dusty, cold, hot, mountainous, wet, or low-speed/extended-idle conditions.

tasks.name: Engine Coolant Level
tasks.notes: Inspect and top up if necessary. Also check at every refuelling stop.

tasks.name: Engine Coolant Replacement
tasks.notes: Replace at first 192,000 km (120,000 miles) or 120 months; after that, every 96,000 km (60,000 miles) or 60 months, whichever comes first. Use Mazda FL-22 coolant; using other coolant may cause serious engine damage.

tasks.name: Fuel Lines & Hoses
tasks.notes: Inspect and replace if necessary. Failure to perform does not void emissions warranty but Mazda recommends adherence to schedule.

tasks.name: Hoses and Tubes for Emission
tasks.notes: Inspect and replace if necessary. Failure to perform does not void emissions warranty but Mazda recommends adherence to schedule.

tasks.name: Brake Lines, Hoses and Connections
tasks.notes: Inspect and replace if necessary.

tasks.name: Vacuum Brake Booster and Hose
tasks.notes: Inspect and replace if necessary.

tasks.name: Brake & Clutch Fluid Level
tasks.notes: Inspect and top up if necessary. Also check at every refuelling stop.

tasks.name: Disc Brakes
tasks.notes: Inspect pad thickness, disc condition, and caliper operation; replace if necessary.

tasks.name: Tire Rotation
tasks.notes: Rotate every 8,000 km (5,000 miles). After rotation, inflate all tires to specification and check lug nut torque. Do not rotate unidirectional or asymmetric-tread tires side-to-side.

tasks.name: Tire Inflation Pressure and Tire Wear
tasks.notes: Inspect and adjust tire inflation pressure; inspect for uneven wear or damage. Also inspect spare tire if equipped. Check at least monthly per owner maintenance guidance.

tasks.name: Steering Operation and Linkages
tasks.notes: Inspect and replace if necessary.

tasks.name: Front and Rear Suspension, Ball Joints and Wheel Bearing Axial Play
tasks.notes: Inspect and replace if necessary.

tasks.name: Body Condition Inspection (Rust, Corrosion and Perforation)
tasks.notes: Inspect body panels for rust, corrosion, and perforation; treat or repair if necessary.

tasks.name: Driveshaft Dust Boot
tasks.notes: Inspect and replace if necessary.

tasks.name: Bolts and Nuts on Chassis and Body
tasks.notes: Check torque and tighten if necessary.

tasks.name: Exhaust System and Heat Shields
tasks.notes: Inspect for leaks, damage, and loose heat shields; repair or replace if necessary.

tasks.name: Emergency Flat Tire Repair Kit
tasks.notes: If equipped: inspect annually. Check tire repair fluid expiration date; replace the fluid bottle before the expiration date.

tasks.name: Function of All Lights
tasks.notes: Inspect all exterior and interior lights for correct operation; replace bulbs if necessary.

tasks.name: Windshield Washer Fluid Level
tasks.notes: Check and top up at every refuelling stop per owner maintenance guidance.
